title: Tax offset questions T4-T11
description: How to complete the tax offset questions T4 to T11 in your paper supplementary tax return.

child_links.title: T4 - Superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse 2013
child_links.description: Complete question T4 if you made contributions to a complying superannuation fund or RSA on behalf of your spouse.

child_links.title: T5 - Zone or overseas forces 2013
child_links.description: Complete question T5 if you want to claim a zone or overseas forces tax offset.

child_links.title: T6 - Total net medical expenses 2013
child_links.description: Complete question T6 to claim a tax offset for medical expenses.

child_links.title: T7 Dependent (invalid and carer)
child_links.description: Complete question T7 if you maintained a person who was 16 years or older and received particular government payments.

child_links.title: T8 - Landcare and water facility 2013
child_links.description: Complete question T8 if you have an unused 'landcare and water facility' tax offset from a pervious year.

child_links.title: T9 - Net income from working - supplementary section 2013
child_links.description: Provides information to help us work out your mature age worker tax offset entitlement.

child_links.title: T10 - Other non-refundable tax offsets 2013
child_links.description: Complete question T10 to claim other non-refundable tax offsets.

child_links.title: T11 - Other refundable tax offsets 2013
child_links.description: Complete question T11 to claim other refundable tax offsets.

child_links.title: Total supplement tax offsets 2013
child_links.description: Complete the total supplement tax offsets section in your supplementary tax return.
